news.t: These ‘Deep Value' Stocks Are Ready to Bounce Back
10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.
Roundhill Acquirers Deep Value ETF Announces Strategy Change

holdings.infoBox: DEEP is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Axcelis Technologies stock at 1.97%, Franklin Covey Co. at 1.68%, Helen of Troy at 1.68%, Kforce at 1.57%, and NVE Corporation at 1.50%.

overview.description: The Acquirers Small and Micro Deep Value ETF (DEEP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Acquirers Deep Value- TR index. The fund tracks an equal-weighted index of 100 smallest US stocks, by market-cap, that are potentially undervalued based on their fundamentals. DEEP was launched on Sep 23, 2014 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.

data.title: These ‘Deep Value' Stocks Are Ready to Bounce Back
data.text: The underperformance of the markets cheapest stocks in 2022 was an anomaly. Some names to consider.

data.title: 10 Best Value ETFs to Buy for Bundled Bargains
data.text: Value stocks are finally having their day, and many expect the run to continue. These are the best value ETFs to leverage this long-awaited revival.

data.title: Not All Value ETFs Are Created Equal. Here's How to Choose a Winner.
data.text: After growth's long ascendancy, value shares are getting their day in the sun. To determine which have the best prospects, check for factors including liquidity, quality, size, and momentum.

data.title: Roundhill Acquirers Deep Value ETF Announces Strategy Change
